# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: enable-envoy-admin-all-sidecars
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  meshConfig:
    defaultConfig:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
  components:
    pilot:
      k8s:
        overlays:
          - kind: Deployment
            name: istiod
            patches:
              - path: spec.template.spec.containers.[name:discovery].env[-1]
                value:
                  name: ISTIO_ENVOY_ADMIN_PORT
                  value: "15000"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: istio-sidecar-envoy-admin-expose
  namespace: istio-system
data:
  custom_bootstrap.json: |-
    {
      "admin": {
        "access_log_path": "/dev/null",
        "address": {
          "socket_address": {
            "address": "0.0.0.0",
            "port_value": 15000
          }
        }
      }
    }
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: expose-envoy-admin-15000-all-sidecars
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  workloadSelector: {}
  configPatches:
    - applyTo: BOOTSTRAP
      match:
        context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
      patch:
        operation: MERGE
        value:
          admin:
            access_log_path: /dev/null
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 0.0.0.0
                port_value: 15000
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: allow-envoy-admin-port
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels: {}
  ingress:
    - port:
        number: 15000
        protocol: TCP
        name: envoy-admin
      defaultEndpoint: 127.0.0.1:15000
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: ALLOW_ANY
